title: Indian Post-Workout Samosas
description: A delicious Indian-inspired snack to refuel after a workout. Crispy samosas filled with spiced potatoes and peas.
instructions: Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Fry the samosas until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
In a separate pan, heat the melted buttery over medium heat.
Add the ground indian spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced post potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the frozen workout peas and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Sift the post-workout scoop of whey protein powder over the potato mixture and stir to combine.
Serve the potato mixture in the fried samosas and enjoy!
Optional: garnish with chopped cilantro or a dollop of yogurt.
